name: Two Rivers Golf Club, Elmwood Lounge and Simulators
address: 150 Oak Tree Ln, North Sioux City, SD 57049
about: Two Rivers Golf Club is a full-service golf facility located in Dakota Dunes, South Dakota. The venue operates as a country club, offering traditional golf play on a course alongside an indoor golf simulator experience. Access to the golf simulators is provided on an hourly basis, with potential seasonal pricing adjustments. The facility caters to both on-course players and those seeking a simulated golf experience, offering amenities for leagues, tournaments, and various social events for its members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulators available for year-round practice and play
Hosts a variety of leagues and tournaments for competitive golfers
Offers comprehensive instruction programs for golfers of all skill levels
Full-service country club environment with a strong community focus
